link.title: More Git Guides for Absolute Beginners
link.description: Ready to level up your Git skills? This section dives into more advanced topics like resolving merge conflicts and choosing the right open source license for your projects. Whether you're collaborating with a team or sharing your code with the world, these guides will help you navigate the complexities of Git and GitHub with confidence. Let's go beyond the basics and master the tools that power modern software development!
